make variant1 VARIANT=v001 RAW=data/raw.csv CLEANING_STRATEGY=basic NAN_VALUES="[-999999]"
make script1-run VARIANT=v001
make script1-check-results VARIANT=v001 # Verificar que todos los files se han creado correctamente.

make variant2 VARIANT=v011 PARENT=v001 BANDS="10 25 50 75 90" STRATEGY=both NAN=keep
make script2-run VARIANT=v011
make script2-check-results VARIANT=v011

make variant3 VARIANT=v111 PARENT=v011 OW=600 LT=300 PW=600 WS=synchro NAN=preserve
make script3-run VARIANT=v111
make script3-check-results VARIANT=v111

make variant4 VARIANT=v201 PARENT=v111  PREDICTION_NAME=name OBJECTIVE="{operator: OR, events: [GRID_OVERVOLTAGE, INVERTER_FAULT]}"
make script4-run VARIANT=v201
make script4-check-results VARIANT=v201

make variant5 VARIANT=v111 PARENT=v101 MODEL_FAMILY=dense_bow IMBALANCE_STRATEGY=rare_events IMBALANCE_MAX_MAJ=20000
make script5-run VARIANT=v301
make script5-check-results VARIANT=v301
